description: Install openpgp dependency and create the core E2E encryption library in packages/auth/src/e2e/ with Signal Protocol primitives (X3DH, Double Ratchet), MLS group key management, sealed sender, encrypted backup, device linking, and safety numbers. All using Node.js crypto module. Each module gets a co-located test file in packages/auth/src/e2e/__tests__/.
steps: Run: pnpm --filter @quant/auth add openpgp

Create packages/auth/src/e2e/identity-key.ts - Long-term identity keypair per user using Ed25519 via crypto.generateKeyPairSync. Export class IdentityKeyService with methods: generateIdentityKeyPair(), serializePublicKey(), deserializePublicKey(). Keys stored as base64-encoded DER.

Create packages/auth/src/e2e/prekey-bundle.ts - One-time prekeys + signed prekey for offline message initiation. Export class PreKeyBundleService. Methods: generateSignedPreKey(identityKey), generateOneTimePreKeys(count), createBundle(identityKey, signedPreKey, oneTimePreKeys). Uses Ed25519 for signing, X25519 for DH.

Create packages/auth/src/e2e/device-keys.ts - Per-device key generation and linking. Export class DeviceKeyService. Methods: generateDeviceKeyPair() (X25519 for DH), linkDevice(masterIdentity, deviceKey), verifyDeviceLink(). Uses crypto.diffieHellman for ECDH.

Create packages/auth/src/e2e/safety-numbers.ts - Verifiable fingerprint between two users. Export function computeSafetyNumber(identityKeyA, identityKeyB): string that returns a 60-digit numeric fingerprint. Hash both identity public keys with SHA-256, interleave, truncate to 30 bytes, encode as 60 digits.

Create packages/auth/src/e2e/signal-session.ts - X3DH key agreement + Double Ratchet session. Export class SignalSession. Methods: initializeAsInitiator(ownIdentity, recipientBundle), initializeAsResponder(ownIdentity, ownPreKey, initiatorMessage), ratchetEncrypt(plaintext), ratchetDecrypt(header, ciphertext). Uses HKDF for key derivation, AES-256-GCM for message encryption, chain key ratcheting.

Create packages/auth/src/e2e/mls-group.ts - TreeKEM-inspired group key management for groups up to 1000 members. Export class MLSGroup. Methods: create(creatorIdentity), addMember(memberIdentity), removeMember(memberId), encrypt(plaintext), decrypt(senderId, ciphertext), getEpoch(). Each epoch has a new group key derived via HKDF from tree secrets.

Create packages/auth/src/e2e/sealed-sender.ts - Hide sender identity from server. Export class SealedSenderService. Methods: seal(senderIdentity, recipientPublicKey, plaintext), unseal(recipientPrivateKey, sealedMessage). Encrypts sender info + content together, server only sees recipient.

Create packages/auth/src/e2e/encrypted-backup.ts - Argon2id-derived backup key for encrypting all keys and history. Export class EncryptedBackupService. Methods: createBackup(passphrase, data), restoreBackup(passphrase, encryptedBackup). Uses argon2 (already a dependency) for key derivation, AES-256-GCM for encryption. Backup format includes salt, nonce, ciphertext, auth tag.

Create packages/auth/src/e2e/device-linking.ts - QR code + secure channel for linking new device. Export class DeviceLinkingService. Methods: generateLinkingCode(), verifyLinkingCode(code, devicePublicKey), transferKeys(linkingSession, keysToTransfer). Uses ECDH for secure channel, random challenge for verification.
Create packages/auth/src/e2e/index.ts - barrel export for all e2e modules
Update packages/auth/src/index.ts to re-export from ./e2e
Create packages/auth/src/e2e/__tests__/identity-key.test.ts - Test keypair generation produces valid Ed25519 keys, serialization roundtrip works, unique keys each time
Create packages/auth/src/e2e/__tests__/prekey-bundle.test.ts - Test signed prekey signature verification, one-time prekey generation, bundle creation
Create packages/auth/src/e2e/__tests__/device-keys.test.ts - Test device keypair gen, DH shared secret computation, device linking
Create packages/auth/src/e2e/__tests__/safety-numbers.test.ts - Test two users produce same 60-digit fingerprint, different users produce different fingerprint

Create packages/auth/src/e2e/__tests__/signal-session.test.ts - Test Alice->Bob->Alice round-trip: Alice initiates session with Bob's bundle, encrypts message, Bob decrypts, Bob encrypts reply, Alice decrypts reply. Verify ciphertext differs from plaintext.

Create packages/auth/src/e2e/__tests__/mls-group.test.ts - Test group creation, add member, encrypt/decrypt with group key, remove member (old key cannot decrypt new messages = forward secrecy), epoch advancement
Create packages/auth/src/e2e/__tests__/sealed-sender.test.ts - Test seal/unseal roundtrip, server cannot see sender identity in sealed payload
Create packages/auth/src/e2e/__tests__/encrypted-backup.test.ts - Test encrypt->restore with passphrase recovers original, wrong passphrase fails, backup includes all expected fields
Create packages/auth/src/e2e/__tests__/device-linking.test.ts - Test linking code generation, verification, key transfer over secure channel
acceptance_criteria: All test files in packages/auth/src/e2e/__tests__/ pass with NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run packages/auth
Alice->Bob->Alice 1:1 round-trip test passes in signal-session.test.ts
MLS group add/remove/forward-secrecy test passes in mls-group.test.ts
Safety number test: two users produce identical 60-digit fingerprint
Encrypted backup: encrypt->restore with correct passphrase recovers original data
Server cannot decrypt: ciphertext is verified to not contain plaintext in signal-session and sealed-sender tests
TypeScript compiles with no errors (strict mode)
findings: All 45 new e2e tests pass plus 46 existing tests (91 total). Pre-existing TS6305 errors about packages/common dist output exist but are unrelated to these changes. The prettier pre-commit hook reformatted files on commit - no issues. NODE_OPTIONS must be unset for git operations due to husky/commitlint hooks.
